[Find out more](https://www.thegaragecarrental.co.uk/cars-for-sale-croydon/index.php) # Welcome to The Garage Car Rental. ## Cheap car rental based in Croydon We are an independent car rental business based in **Croydon**, Surrey. We offer a wide range of used car models from a small economy car to a large family saloon car. Our fleet offers a comprehensive choice of transportation services. We have been established in Croydon since 1978 beginning with a small fleet of Volkswagen Beetles and progressing to today's fleet. Because of our compact operation, we believe we can offer you some of the best deals around, from the visiting tourist to the longer term hirer including private hire (PHV) drivers. # Why use The Garage Car Rental? ## See the benefits below: - Lowest price guarantee - We are independent which means we can offer you the best deals - Our cars are not brand new, that's why our prices are low! - Over 45 years experience in the car rental business - Our vehicles are mechanically tested and valeted on site - Clear honest pricing - Straightforward cancellation policy # Car Hire ![Cheap Car Hire Croydon](https://www.thegaragecarrental.co.uk/images/home_car-hire_croydon.jpg) ## Budget Cars (over 6 years old) | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | | ![cheap car hire croydon](https://www.thegaragecarrental.co.uk/images/thumb_Octavia.png) | | Skoda Octavia (Diesel)
